text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: That was amazing, Trainer! You actually won!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much! You didn't have to go so far
for my sisters...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: I'll let them know you're to thank!
